title: centaurea cynarocephala
intro: Centaurea cynarocephala, also known as the cornflower or corn chamomile, is a plant species within the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which can help soothe digestive issues and relieve menstrual cramps. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. Centaurea cynarocephala is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
